problem id: 3dc918eb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  10010111 -> 01111011
  11100000 -> 01111110
  10010110 -> 01101011
  11101001 -> 11111110
  10001111 -> 11111111
  00111111 -> 11111111
  01111100 -> 11111111
  11001100 -> 11101110
  11111100 -> 11111111
  11000101 -> 01111110

query: 11010100
predicted answer: 01101111
